title: Lightweight ML Toolchain
summary: A chain of 3 papers building a lightweight machine learning toolchain. Scikit-learn establishes the core ML framework with estimator API, algorithms (KNN, PCA, KMeans, Lasso/ElasticNet), pipeline composition, cross-validation, grid search, and evaluation metrics. Imbalanced-learn extends this framework with resampling methods (SMOTE, RandomOverSampler, RandomUnderSampler, TomekLinks, EditedNearestNeighbours), combined methods (SMOTETomek, SMOTEENN), an imbalanced-aware pipeline, and imbalanced classification metrics. Auto-sklearn implements automated machine learning with Bayesian optimization (GP surrogate, EI acquisition), meta-learning with dataset meta-features, ensemble selection from model libraries, CASH (combined algorithm selection and hyperparameter optimization), pipeline structure search, Hyperband multi-fidelity optimization, and multi-objective NAS.
instructionPreview: Implement a lightweight ML toolchain as a Python package called `minilearn`. Working directory: /workspace. The base package provides utility functions (check_random_state, check_array, euclidean_distances).
instruction:
Implement a lightweight ML toolchain as a Python package called `minilearn`.
Working directory: /workspace. The base package provides utility functions
(check_random_state, check_array, euclidean_distances).

Implement two modules in order:

1. **Scikit-learn core** (minilearn/base.py, preprocessing.py, decomposition.py,
   cluster.py, neighbors.py, linear_model.py, pipeline.py, model_selection.py,
   metrics.py, datasets.py): BaseEstimator API with get_params/set_params/clone,
   StandardScaler, PCA (via SVD), KMeans (k-means++ + Lloyd), KNeighborsClassifier,
   Lasso/ElasticNet (coordinate descent), Pipeline, KFold/StratifiedKFold,
   cross_val_score, GridSearchCV, accuracy/precision/recall/f1 metrics, and
   make_classification/make_regression generators.

2. **Imbalanced-learn** (minilearn/resampling.py, combine.py,
   imbalanced_pipeline.py, imbalanced_metrics.py): BaseSampler with fit_resample,
   RandomOverSampler, SMOTE (k-NN interpolation), RandomUnderSampler,
   TomekLinks, EditedNearestNeighbours, SMOTETomek, SMOTEENN,
   ImbalancedPipeline (sampler-aware), geometric_mean_score,
   sensitivity_score, specificity_score.

Each module has an experiment script outputting EXPERIMENT_NAME: VALUE lines.
Tests verify deterministic results with seed=42.

moduleDag.description: A chain of 3 papers building a lightweight machine learning toolchain. Scikit-learn establishes the core ML framework with estimator API, algorithms (KNN, PCA, KMeans, Lasso/ElasticNet), pipeline composition, cross-validation, grid search, and evaluation metrics. Imbalanced-learn extends this framework with resampling methods (SMOTE, RandomOverSampler, RandomUnderSampler, TomekLinks, EditedNearestNeighbours), combined methods (SMOTETomek, SMOTEENN), an imbalanced-aware pipeline, and imbalanced classification metrics. Auto-sklearn implements automated machine learning with Bayesian optimization (GP surrogate, EI acquisition), meta-learning with dataset meta-features, ensemble selection from model libraries, CASH (combined algorithm selection and hyperparameter optimization), pipeline structure search, Hyperband multi-fidelity optimization, and multi-objective NAS.

nodes.label: Scikit-learn: Machine Learning in Python
nodes.description: Core ML framework with BaseEstimator API (get_params/set_params/clone), StandardScaler, PCA, KMeans, KNeighborsClassifier, Lasso, ElasticNet, Pipeline, cross_val_score, GridSearchCV, and classification metrics.

nodes.label: Imbalanced-learn: Tackling Imbalanced Datasets
nodes.description: Extensions for imbalanced datasets: BaseSampler with fit_resample, SMOTE, RandomOverSampler, RandomUnderSampler, TomekLinks, EditedNearestNeighbours, SMOTETomek, SMOTEENN, ImbalancedPipeline, and imbalanced metrics.

nodes.label: Auto-sklearn: Automated Machine Learning
nodes.description: Automated machine learning framework with Bayesian optimization (Gaussian Process surrogate, Expected Improvement acquisition), meta-learning with dataset meta-features (statistical, info-theoretic, landmarking), ensemble selection from model libraries (greedy forward selection with replacement), CASH (combined algorithm selection and hyperparameter optimization with per-algorithm GP surrogates and UCB-based algorithm selection), pipeline structure search, Hyperband/BOHB multi-fidelity optimization, evolutionary neural architecture search, multi-objective NSGA-II optimization with Pareto front maintenance and hypervolume computation.

edges.label: imbalanced-learn extends scikit-learn with resampling and ensemble methods
Auto-sklearn automates scikit-learn model selection and tuning
Auto-sklearn includes imbalanced-learn samplers in pipeline search
